title: 3 Amazing Facts About Trees

segments.text: Some trees can live for thousands of years, with the oldest known tree being over 4,800 years old.
Trees communicate with each other through a complex underground network of fungi.
One large tree can absorb enough carbon dioxide to offset emissions from a car for a year.
Trees can grow fruit that looks completely different in various climates.
The Amazon rainforest produces 20% of the world's oxygen.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Trees are essential and full of surprises in nature. Follow for daily facts!
